---
title: "Japanese Strawberry Shortcake"
description: "First time baking a cake from scratch. Made for Father's Day"
author:
  - name: "Zoe Stopfer"
    url: "https://github.com/ZS-25-bit"
date: 2026-06-15
categories: [Quarto, R, MEDS]
citation:
  url: "https://www.justonecookbook.com/japanese-strawberry-shortcake/"
image: "cake.jpg"
draft: false
---

Hello and welcome to my website! My name is Zoe and I am currently getting a B.S in Environmental Studies at UCSB.I am interested in a future career that involves research in conservation or dealing with invasive species.  Outside of school, my simple pleasures are baking, participating in Jiu Jitsu, and raspberry lemonade!
